entries.theme: AI tools for structured thinking and productivity
entries.description: Multiple newsletters covering Claude/AI tools not just for output speed but for improving judgment and structured thinking. AI gains are more modest than expected due to SDLC bottlenecks. Extending to AI style guides for voice consistency, agentic coding workflows, and parallel agent patterns.

entries.theme: Externalising tacit knowledge with AI agents
entries.description: The idea of encoding expert knowledge into AI agents (CLAUDE.md, knowledge bases, style guides) so it doesn't live only in one person's head — seen in both Platform PM and agile/engineering contexts. Now extending to personal writing voice via AI style guides and engineering workflow documentation.

Themes around overcoming self-limiting beliefs, navigating performance reviews, building leadership skills in an AI-changed landscape. AI skill path frameworks, job safety analysis, and AI-driven org restructuring reshaping what engineering leadership means.

entries.theme: AI agents disrupting open source workflows
entries.description: AI agents autonomously spamming repositories with low-quality PRs is breaking the open contribution model. Token overhead and model compatibility issues challenge local agent deployments. The 'anyone can open a PR' era may be ending.

entries.theme: AI lab consolidation and platform wars
entries.description: OpenAI acquires Astral (uv/Python tooling) for Codex; Anthropic acquired Bun in Dec 2025; Cursor launches Composer 2; Bezos raises $100B AI-transformation fund; OpenAI/Anthropic in PE joint venture talks. AI infrastructure and tooling is becoming a fierce strategic battleground worth billions.

entries.theme: Vibe coding's limits at production scale
entries.description: Building with vibe coding is fast but maintaining production apps reveals hard limits: AI agents prefer local patches over root cause analysis, models lack best practices for niche libraries, and the fix→deploy→monitor loop is slow at scale. 'Semantic Anchors' — developer trigger words — explain why non-engineers can't vibe-code to production. Human expertise is shifting from writing code to directing diagnosis.
